requirement_topic.en: Chemical Safety — Phthalates, Surface Coatings & Heavy Metals
requirement_topic.zh: 化学安全——邻苯二甲酸酯、表面涂层及重金属
requirement_topic.zht: 化學安全——鄰苯二甲酸酯、表面塗層及重金屬

summary.en: Canada regulates toy chemicals through multiple mandatory instruments. The Toys Regulations include toxicological provisions and schedules. The Surface Coating Materials Regulations restrict lead and mercury in surface coating materials and applied stickers, films, or coatings. The Phthalates Regulations SOR/2016-188 restrict specified phthalates in toys and child care articles, including accessible vinyl and soft plastic components.
summary.zh: 加拿大通过多个强制性法规管理玩具化学安全。《玩具条例》包含毒理要求及附表。《表面涂层材料条例》限制表面涂层材料及已施加的贴纸、薄膜或涂层中的铅和汞。《邻苯二甲酸酯条例》SOR/2016-188限制玩具及儿童护理用品中特定邻苯二甲酸酯，包括可触及的乙烯基和软塑料部件。
summary.zht: 加拿大通過多個強制性法規管理玩具化學安全。《玩具條例》包含毒理要求及附表。《表面塗層材料條例》限制表面塗層材料及已施加的貼紙、薄膜或塗層中的鉛和汞。《鄰苯二甲酸酯條例》SOR/2016-188限制玩具及兒童護理用品中特定鄰苯二甲酸酯，包括可觸及的乙烯基和軟塑膠部件。

standards_or_laws: Toys Regulations (SOR/2011-17), toxicological hazards and Schedule 2

summary.en: China's GB 6675.3-2014 covers migration of certain elements, and GB 6675.1 / GB 6675.2 may address some toxicological and accessible-material issues. Export-oriented manufacturers may also screen phthalates for overseas buyers, but domestic CCC compliance alone does not prove compliance with Canada's specific phthalate and surface-coating regulations.
summary.zh: 中国GB 6675.3-2014涵盖特定元素迁移，GB 6675.1 / GB 6675.2也可能涉及部分毒理和可触及材料问题。出口型制造商可能会按海外买方要求筛查邻苯二甲酸酯，但仅有国内CCC合规不能证明符合加拿大特定的邻苯二甲酸酯和表面涂层法规。
summary.zht: 中國GB 6675.3-2014涵蓋特定元素遷移，GB 6675.1 / GB 6675.2也可能涉及部分毒理和可觸及材料問題。出口型製造商可能會按海外買方要求篩查鄰苯二甲酸酯，但僅有國內CCC合規不能證明符合加拿大特定的鄰苯二甲酸酯和表面塗層法規。

standards_or_laws: GB 6675.3-2014 — Safety of toys — Migration of certain elements
GB 24613-2009 — Limit of harmful substances of coatings for toys
GB/T 22048 series — Determination of phthalate plasticizers in toys and children's products

gap.en: Canada requires a Canadian chemical review by material and function: coatings, films, stickers, paints, soft plastics, mouthing-accessible parts, and fillings should be tested against Canadian limits. Chinese migration and coating reports may not include Canada's exact phthalate scope, product definitions, or applied-coating rules. Supplier declarations should be backed by accredited laboratory reports for high-risk PVC, elastomers, coatings, and printed surfaces.
gap.zh: 加拿大要求按材料和功能进行加拿大化学审查：涂层、薄膜、贴纸、油漆、软塑料、可入口接触部件及填充物均应按加拿大限值测试。中国迁移和涂层报告可能未覆盖加拿大的准确邻苯二甲酸酯范围、产品定义或已施加涂层规则。对高风险PVC、弹性体、涂层和印刷表面，供应商声明应有认可实验室报告支持。
gap.zht: 加拿大要求按材料和功能進行加拿大化學審查：塗層、薄膜、貼紙、油漆、軟塑膠、可入口接觸部件及填充物均應按加拿大限值測試。中國遷移和塗層報告可能未覆蓋加拿大的準確鄰苯二甲酸酯範圍、產品定義或已施加塗層規則。對高風險PVC、彈性體、塗層和印刷表面，供應商聲明應有認可實驗室報告支持。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Canadian chemical restrictions apply under CCPSA regulations including SOR/2016-188 and SOR/2016-193
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for GB 6675 / CCC chemical items; some phthalate screening may be voluntary or buyer-driven for exports

source.publisher: Justice Laws Website / Government of Canada

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Canada chemical gap is material-specific. A GB 6675 chemical pass is not enough; toys with coatings, soft plastics, vinyl, printed films, or stickers need Canadian phthalate and surface-coating checks before import or sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加拿大化学差距取决于具体材料。通过GB 6675化学项目并不足够；含涂层、软塑料、乙烯基、印刷薄膜或贴纸的玩具在进口或销售前需要完成加拿大邻苯二甲酸酯和表面涂层核查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 加拿大化學差距取決於具體材料。通過GB 6675化學項目並不足夠；含塗層、軟塑膠、乙烯基、印刷薄膜或貼紙的玩具在進口或銷售前需要完成加拿大鄰苯二甲酸酯和表面塗層核查。
